articles.title: Polygon Successfully Completes ‘Performance-Boosting’ Hard Fork As MATIC Targets $2 Price High
articles.description: The much-awaited hard fork aimed at boosting Polygon’s performance went live today at block 38,189,056, brewing a wave of optimism among the MATIC community.

articles.title: Litecoin has over 170.5 million total addresses, surpassing Ethereum
articles.description: Total addresses are the total number of unique addresses that ever appeared in a transaction of the native coin in the network.

articles.title: Bitcoin stays above $21,000; Silvergate, Coinbase pare earlier gains
articles.description: Crypto-related stocks raced off at the open today before paring gains.

articles.title: Polygon Upgrade Goes Live Following Low Governance Vote Turnout
articles.description: A DAO analyst tells Blockworks lack of voter participation should not be perceived as a necessarily bad side of decentralized governance

articles.title: Filecoin Foundation set to test IPFS-based communication in space
articles.description: Filecoin Foundation will deploy IPFS aboard a Lockheed Martin spacecraft this year to test decentralized storage in space.
